name: github_create_repo_attestation
description: Create an artifact attestation for a repository (POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/attestations). Sends a Sigstore bundle as JSON. `bundle` may be an object, a JSON string of the bundle, or a path to a JSON file (read locally by the server). Requires repo write access; fine-grained tokens need attestations:write. Attestations are normally produced by the GitHub attest action or compatible tooling—see GitHub docs.

anyOf.description: Sigstore bundle as a JSON string, or an absolute/relative path to a .json file containing the bundle (read on the machine running the MCP server).

bundle.description: Sigstore bundle: object, JSON string, or path to a .json file containing mediaType, verificationMaterial, dsseEnvelope, …
